description_long: This is a classic claw hammer featuring a robust metallic head and a wooden handle with a black, ergonomic grip. The head is composed of a flat striking face on one side and a curved claw on the other, designed for pulling nails. The handle is slightly curved for comfort and control, with a textured black grip that appears to be made of rubber or a similar material for slip resistance. The wood grain of the handle is visible, giving it a traditional appearance, while the head has a matte metallic finish. The hammer is compact and well-balanced, suitable for a variety of construction or repair tasks in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or maintenance areas. No visible branding, wear, or accessories are present, and the object appears clean and well-maintained.
description: A traditional claw hammer with a metallic head, wooden handle, and black ergonomic grip, featuring a flat striking face and a curved claw for nail removal.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat striking face, the full width of the head, and the black ergonomic grip on the handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved wooden handle, the full length of the hammer, and the profile of the claw and striking face.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the curved claw, the top of the handle, and the symmetry of the head.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the other profile of the head, handle, and grip, with the claw and striking face visible.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a black rubberized ergonomic grip, featuring textured sections for enhanced hold.
attribute_head_type: Claw hammer head with a flat striking face on one side and a curved, split claw on the other for nail removal.
